title: Mosquito Origin
body:
🦟 Mosquito Origin 🦟

Description: You are a very annoying creature :/

✅ Positive powers:

  - Blood Consumer: You gain a boost when you consume blood from other entities.                
  - Lightweight: You don't take fall damage.                           
  - Night vision: You can clearly see in the dark when it's night.

✴️ Neutral powers:

  - Mount: You can mount your victims.
  - Flight: You have the ability to fly.

⛔ Negative powers:

  - Hunger: You have a fast metabolism, so you need to eat more.
  - Fragile Size: As a mosquito, you have a smaller size and lower health.
  - Carnivore: You can only eat meat.


You need Origins mod and Pehkui mod in order to use this origin.
